title: inputs
description: Inputs used to select or evaluate a time-base part. Mirrors the SAS / AAS inputs structure: a required designRequirements seed plus optional operatingPoints (the conditions under which the part's frequency error and dissipation are evaluated). outputs[i] aligns positionally with operatingPoints[i].

operatingPoint.description: One operating condition relevant to a time base: ambient temperature dominates frequency error, supply voltage sets dissipation and (for VCXO) the control window.

supplyVoltage.description: Supply voltage at this point, in V.
